title: Turkish Pizza
description: A crispy Turkish pizza with melted cheese and savory bacon.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to your desired thickness.
Spread the mozzarella cheese evenly over the dough.
Layer the pepperoni slices over the cheese.
Cook the bacon in a pan until crispy.
Crumble the bacon into small pieces.
Sprinkle the crumbled bacon and oregano over the pizza.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the pizza from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the pizza into 8 equal pieces and serve.
